body:
Hey Amara,

Hope you're doing well — it's been a minute since we caught up properly. I wanted to loop back on the conversation we had a few weeks ago about [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) and whether there's room to co-invest on a couple of the climate infrastructure deals I've been tracking at [Threshold Ventures](orgs/threshold-ventures). There are two companies in particular that I think sit right in your sweet spot — one doing grid-edge optimization software and another building cooling infrastructure for AI data centers, which feels almost tailor-made for your dual thesis. Would love to get 30 minutes on the calendar this week or next to walk you through the decks and see if there's appetite on your end. Let me know what works.

Mina
